title: Fix #12: iOS list scroll blocked by row gestures

text: RCA complete: OR-shaped root cause verified (both row gestures independently starve the List scroll pan). Council chose C1: UIKit-bridged recognizers + five-interaction test matrix. Report posted to issue #12. Proceeding to fix.

RCA complete: OR-shaped root cause verified (both row gestures independently starve the List scroll pan). Council chose C1: UIKit-bridged recognizers + five-interaction test matrix. Report posted to issue #12. Proceeding to fix.

Fix implemented (C1: UIKit-bridged ReorderLongPressGesture + HorizontalSwipePanGesture + SwipePanProjection). Witness ListScrollUITests 3/3 green x4 runs; new LongPressReorderUITests + TaskTapOpenUITests green x2; LillistCore 1004 green; macOS builds. Pre-existing StatusCycle tap-arm failure filed as #15; prior handoff follow-up filed as #16. Full iOS scheme run in progress; then commits + PR.
